title: Earnings call transcript: Marathon Digital Q1 2026 reports major EPS miss
text: Marathon Digital Holdings Q1 2026 earnings call where the company reported a major EPS miss. Revenue was $174.6 million, below the FactSet analyst consensus estimate of $181.9 million and an 18% decline from $213.9 million in the same period last year. The company reported EPS of -$3.31 compared to a forecast of -$1.41, representing a major negative surprise. The net loss was $1.3 billion, primarily driven by a $520.4 million increase in operating loss, largely due to unfavorable bitcoin mark-to-market adjustments of ($1.0 billion) and restructuring costs of $45.9 million during the quarter. Marathon delivered a record energized hash rate of 72.2 exahash per second in Q1 2026, up 33% from 54.3 exahash per second in Q1 2025. The company increased its share of available Bitcoin mining rewards to 5.5% from 4.8% in Q4 2025. The company strengthened the balance sheet and reduced potential dilution from convertible notes by as much as approximately 46 million shares.
